ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Size code for internal use */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the size was last updated */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code for international sizing standards */,
  "additional_measurements" TEXT /* Additional measurements in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the product belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is designed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in this size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, product manager, customer support) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., size_id, product_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size revision */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "bust" REAL /* Revised bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Revised waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" REAL /* Revised hip measurement in inches */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Revised size code */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes or reasons for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_revisions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guide */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand the size guide belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the size guide */,
  "size_chart_image" TEXT /* File path to the size chart image */,
  "size_chart_text" TEXT /* Text description of the size chart */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL to a PDF version of the size guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_guides_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the feedback is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the feedback is for */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
